programme.title: Luka Cinta Ep263
programme.desc: Salma, a victim of domestic violence, tries to move on from her past. The presence of two men catches her attention, but her childhood trauma makes her hesitate to open her heart. programme.title: Babysitter
programme.desc: In the midst of a messy divorce, Ray's clueless mom hires Anjelika, the eccentric daughter of a dead popstar to babysit his younger sister Stella. Anjelika gets along well with teenage Ray and even tries to help Ray win the affections of his crush, Sadie. Soon, Ray and Anjelika form a special bond, which threatens to jeopardize his mother's master plan to gain custody of Ray and Stella.

Seterusnya, tajuk ini akan menerangkan secara terperinci tentang sinopsis, tema dan persoalan, plot penceritaan, watak dan perwatakan, latar serta nilai dan pengajaran. One night, they break into Workshop 13, an abandoned sewing factory, where a security guard had hanged himself. On entering, they are greeted by the cold gaze of three mannequins.

programme.title: Selamat Hari Tak Jadi
programme.desc: A group of mischievous college students led by Hani, uses recording of prank victims to gain fame and popularity through their social media platform. But everything suddenly changes when the college decides to suspend Hani after finding out one of the prank victims, Puteri, had attempted to commit suicide when her embarrassing prank video was released online. Now, her gang agree to demote Hani.

programme.title: Kabin Di Tepi Tasik
programme.desc: After returning from overseas, Rusyd investigates the mysterious death of his father. His search for truth leads him to a remote lakeside cabin, where dark secrets begin to surface.

programme.title: Dendam Sundel Bolong
programme.desc: This horror story revolves around a woman who was brutally wronged and murdered, then rises from her grave to seek revenge.

programme.title: Pelepas Saka
programme.desc: Haider and his wife Alisya return to Kampung Melati to attend a prayer held by Haider's parents. Haider's twin brother Raden is also in attendance. programme.title: Deep Fear
programme.desc: Paris, the Eighties.three students decide to celebrate their graduation with a visit of Paris catacombs. When they discover the legendary 717 Bunker, little do they know it's not the only thing Nazi soldiers have left behind them. Something, someone, is hunting them. Trapped deep underground, the group needs to get out before it's too late.

programme.title: Badi
programme.desc: While doing their housemanship in a hospital, four medical students Joe, Faiz, Tania and Kila are tasked with conducting an anatomical inspection of the recently departed mid-wife Mek Nak. programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back sa

programme.title: The Whale Whisperer
programme.desc: This film follows the inspiring relationship between whale whisperer Vicki Neville and thehumpback whales of Australia. Never-before-seen behaviours have been documented by a team of five cinematographers over the three-month whale season in Hervey Bay, all captured in glorious 4K. These stunning close encounters capture whales like you have never seen them before!

programme.title: Get Out Alive with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: In the season finale, survival expert Bear Grylls selects the winner of $500,000 after a relentless journey to New Zealand's West Coast --‐ a wet, rainforest amidst torrential downpour where only one team will “Get Out Alive”.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara goes to Yawuru conservation park to try and catch some mud crabs with cultural guide Bart, who is originally from Broome.

programme.title: Don't Drive Here
programme.desc: In Mexico City, for every baby born, two new vehicles hit these over-burdened streets.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-2
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it's a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there's excitement in the air

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: This week a heavy rescue like no other – as father and son Dave and Adam Crouch team up to save a lorry transporting a train from sinking into soft ground. Crouch Recovery Op Jim must rescue a lorry from a ditch after the driver attempted an ill-advised three-point turn. And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese….

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: TV's most savage social experiment returns as Search4Hurt starts its mission to find the fittest everyday Aussies to join their hybrid sporting team, starting with HurtCamp.

programme.title: Search4Hurt - Season 4
programme.desc: After online qualifiers six male and female athletes take on the last test to claim their spot on Team S4H, that test is HurtCamp.

programme.title: Wild Fed
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: Wild Fed
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the challenge of turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leaks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Western Australia's Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its' ancient landscapes andbrilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back tothe earth's beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in NewSouth Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: Wild Fed
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the challenge of turkey hunting and learns the traditions of foraging fiddleheads and leaks with Avani, Arthur and Sara.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Western Australia's Murchison GeoRegion is well known for its' ancient landscapes andbrilliant skies, this is the real outback. We take a journey through a region full of stories dating back tothe earth's beginning, around 4½ billion years ago.

programme.title: Great Aussie Road Trips
programme.desc: Part One of a journey along the Kamilaroi Highway, from Willow Tree to Moree, in NewSouth Wales, taking in The Great Divide on our way to the Great Australian Outback. Magnificentlandscapes, awesome attractions, and we meet some really cool people as we make our way througha region which traditional owners are spiritually connected to.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-1
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it's a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there's excitement in the air

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2

And while Rory moves an antique fire engine for the boss, Fluff must get rid of a lorry load of stinking cheese….

programme.title: Cikgu Timah Sekolah Bandar
programme.desc: Kisah cikgu Timah yang sudah berkahwin dengan Imran dan berhijrah kembali ke Bandar. Cikgu Timah yang hamil mengalami alahan yang teruk. Pelbagai konflik telah berlaku dalam rumah tangga cikgu Timah. Haziq anak tirinya berusaha untuk memulihkan hubungan cikgu Timah serta ayahnya Imran.

programme.title: Lembut Bukan Lelaki (HD)
programme.desc: Kisah seorang gadis bernama Lembut yang terpaksa berkorban menggugurkan cita-citanya dan menjadi nelayan demi keluarganya yang hidup dilanda kemiskinan. Dibintangi oleh Sharifah Amani, Namron dan Aliza Shadan.

programme.title: Cikgu Gangster
programme.desc: Seorang gangster tersesat dalam hutan lalu menyelinap ke dalam sebuah kem motivasi dan meyamar sebagai guru sementara yang bertugas memantau pelajar nakal. Lakonan Syed Ali, Siti Saleha, Zaidi Omar, Hafiz Zaki

programme.title: Ibu Mertuaku
programme.desc: Cinta Kassim Selamat dan Sabariah mendapat tentangan hebat dari Nyonya Mansor. Dibintangi oleh Allahyarham Tan Sri P.Ramlee, Sarimah, Zaiton dan Ahmad Mahmud.

programme.title: Adiwira Ku
programme.desc: Berdasarkan dari kisah benar mengenai pasukan 'choral speaking' SMK Pinang Tunggal di Kedah yang mengharungi pelbagai kepayahan dan cabaran demi untuk memenangi pertandingan tersebut.

programme.title: Mat Tudung
programme.desc: Seorang buaya darat yang jatuh cinta dengan seorang wanita cantik yang berhijab merancang untuk menarik perhatiannya dengan menyamar. Namun, percubaannya menyebabkan kekecohan yang tidak dijangka!

programme.title: Yasin Terakhir
programme.desc: Setelah lama terpisah, dua sahabat karib ditemukan semula namun seorang daripada akan meninggalkan sahabatnya dan meminta dibacakan yasin terakhir. Dari arahan Rashid Sibir.

programme.title: AstroBiz Mencari Kedai Lejen: Rezeky Tomyam
programme.desc: Mencari Kedai Lejen ialah siri dokumentari yang mengangkat kisah pemilik F&B tempatan. Dua restoran, dua menu berlainan, berkongsi satu legasi kisah Aunty T's serta Rezeky Tomyam, dedikasi dan pengorbanan.

programme.title: Kelas Belakang Ep12
programme.desc: Kelas Belakang

programme.title: You Mean The World To Me
programme.desc: unny, pembuat filem pulang ke kampungnya untuk membuat filem mengenai keluarganya. Berdepan masalah kewangan, dia bersemuka dengan kebenaran tentang keluarganya dan belajar menerima peristiwa lampau.

programme.title: Anak Emak
programme.desc: Kisah seorang ibu tua yang semakin dimamah usia terpaksa pula menumpang dengan anaknya yang baru sahaja bercerai. Dibintangi oleh pasangan ibu dan anak iaitu Seniwati Mariani Ismail dan Melissa Saila.

programme.title: Harry Boy
programme.desc: Pergolakan rumahtangga kedua-dua ibu bapanya telah menyebabkan Harry Boy, seorang pelajar kolej menjadi seorang remaja liar. Sikap liarnya mula berubah setelah mengenali Haryati.

programme.title: The Making of The Furious
programme.desc: The Making of The Furious

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih - Trailer
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Adelia, seorang wanita berkerjaya yang kehilangan suami secara mengejut, lalu berusaha sembuh bersama anaknya dan sahabat baik arwah, menemui makna cinta dan peluang kedua dalam hidup hari ini.

programme.title: Ada Apa Dengan Dosa
programme.desc: Setelah bertahun menetap di Eropah kerana dijaga oleh ibu bapa angkatnya, Aurora pulang ke Malaysia untuk mencari ibu bapa kandungnya. Dia juga memulakan perjalanan rohaniah mencari keredhaan Allah.

programme.title: Pisau Cukur
programme.desc: Apa jadi bila mangsa dan pemangsa terperangkap di kapal mewah? Bella & Intan bertembung 3 Datuk, isteri, anak, seorang detektif dan peminat tegar Bella. Siapa mangsa, siapa pemangsa?

programme.title: Untuk Terakhir Kali
programme.desc: Kisah cinta yang tragis ini mengisahkan tentang Aisyah dan Haris yang menikmati saat-saat akhir cinta mereka pada hari ulang tahun perkahwinan mereka yang pertama. Lakonan Elfira Loy dan Baim Wong.

programme.title: Talentime
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang sebuah pertandingan adu bakat di sekolah yang telah mempertemukan 2 orang insan dalam satu jaringan percintaan walaupun berbeza bangsa keturunan dan latar belakang keluarga.

programme.title: Mama Mama Mia
programme.desc: Kisah kehidupan 3 orang gadis serumah yang mula berubah setelah mereka menemui seorang bayi yang dibuang orang. Lakonan Lisa Surihani, Hanis Zalikha dan Mynn Lee.

programme.title: Ibu Belum Mati
programme.desc: Saiful, budak lelaki berusia 9 tahun menyembunyikan rahsia besar di mana ibunya telah pun meninggal dunia di dalam bilik selama sebulan.

programme.title: Cinta
programme.desc: Lima cerita yang mengisahkan tentang cinta dari perspektif berbeza. Lakonan Sharifah Amani, Pierre Andre, Fasha Sandha, Eizlan Yusof, Rita Rudaini dan ramai lagi.

programme.title: Aku, Mawar & Makhluk Asing
programme.desc: Apabila tunang yang garang tiba-tiba berubah menjadi seorang wanita yang lemah lembut, maka Bart jatuh cinta kembali pada tunangnya, Mawar. Tapi, adakah itu Mawar yang sebenar?

programme.title: Mukhsin
programme.desc: Kisah percintaan pandang pertama di antara Orked dan Mukhsin yang datang dari latar belakang keluarga yang berbeza.

programme.title: Walid Ep01

programme.desc: When Keesha redecorates, the hamsters work to save their favorite play place from being thrown out.

programme.desc: Farmer Yumi's new yoga goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing.

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Feeling comfortable, Alexa complains about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complains about his family's financial situation, which is in dire need of money. Alexa suddenly has an idea: Darman kidnaps Alexa and demands a ransom from her father.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Feeling comfortable, Alexa complains about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complains about his family's financial situation, which is in dire need of money. Alexa suddenly has an idea: Darman kidnaps Alexa and demands a ransom from her father.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: Aku Senang Kalo Kamu Bek Bek Aja?
programme.desc: Mela's marriage to Jordy failed due to her father's disapproval. Dion, a wealthy mama's boy, came to the village and met Mela herding ducks. It turned out that Dion and Mela's mother were friends from college and intended to arrange a marriage for their children.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah

Darman also complains about his family's financial situation, which is in dire need of money. Alexa suddenly has an idea: Darman kidnaps Alexa and demands a ransom from her father.

programme.title: NAWAITU SURGA
programme.desc: This program, which focuses on Islamic jurisprudence and Sufism, draws from everyday life stories and is delivered by highly knowledgeable Ustaz. Its aim is to enlighten us Muslims and guide us toward the ultimate goal of life: Jannah, or God's paradise.

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw her boyfriend, Rangga (Joshua Otay), with another woman. Dania was shocked, not expecting her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman behind her back. Afterward, Dania reflected alone in a park. She said she wished someone had given her a hug when she was so vulnerable.

programme.title: St. Vincent
programme.desc: Maggie, a working single mother, allows Vincent, a hedonistic misanthrope, to babysit her 12-year-old son Oliver. Soon, a beautiful friendship develops between Vincent and Oliver.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Pete and Ellie Wagner, a couple, decide to adopt three siblings Lizzie, Juan and Lita. But trouble knocks at their door when the children's troublesome birth mother is back in the frame.

programme.title: Surviving Christmas
programme.desc: A lonely rude millionaire bribes a family to celebrate Christmas with him.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: Gracie Hart gives up being an FBI field agent to become the public face of the bureau. However, when two of her friends get kidnapped in Las Vegas, she sets out to rescue them, defying direct orders.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: A professor's world turns upside down when she discovers that her longtime boyfriend belongs to an eccentric, super rich family of business moguls.

programme.title: The Lake House
programme.desc: Love blooms when Kate, a doctor, exchanges letters with Alex, an architect who is fed up with his life. Unknown to them, they lead lives two years apart.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: An advice columnist attempts to make a man dump her in 10 days, but he makes a bet with his boss that he will make her fall in love with him.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While trying to escape the evil wizard Gargamel, the blue-skinned Smurfs get sucked into a vortex that teleports them to New York. Thereafter, they try their best to find a way back home.

programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Five couples from Atlanta buckle up to deal with the joys and sorrows of having a baby for the first time. However, they soon realise that parenthood demands a lot more than they anticipated.
